    "Missing bonding jumpers across cable tray expansion joints"

  "actions": [
    "Install UL-listed bonding jumpers across all cable tray expansion joints to ensure electrical continuity"

  "rationale": "Under NEC Article 392.60, cable trays must be electrically continuous and bonded to ensure a safe ground-fault path. Expansion joints interrupt this continuity, requiring bonding jumpers to maintain compliance and safety.",

    "NEC Article 250.96"
  ]
